title: Ocho Old Fashioned Cocktail Recipe | How to make a Ocho Old Fashioned | BACARDÍ Global
clean_text: Ocho Old Fashioned Cocktail Recipe | How to make a Ocho Old Fashioned | BACARDÍ Global OUR RUMS OUR RUMS White Rum BACARDÍ CARTA BLANCA Flavors Flavors Range Spiced BACARDÍ Spiced Dark Rum BACARDÍ Carta Oro BACARDÍ Carta Negra BACARDÍ Añejo Cuatro BACARDÍ Reserva Ocho BACARDÍ Gran Reserva Diez BACARDÍ Gran Reserva Limitada ready to enjoy BACARDÍ x coca-cola Ready to Drink cocktails Ready to Serve cocktails BACARDÍ Coquito View all our rums Cocktails Experiences Experiences Casa BACARDÍ Puerto Rico Visit the World’s largest premium rum distillery. SUSTAINABILITY Our World FAQS BASE RUM BACARDÍ Reserva Ocho rum COCKTAILS Ocho Old Fashioned Created in the early 1900s, the Old Fashioned is deemed 'the original cocktail'. But even the most established cocktail classics can take a refresh. Try it with BACARDÍ Reserva Ocho dark rum instead of whisky. VIDEO HOW TO MAKE A OCHO OLD FASHIONED BACARDÍ Reserva Ocho is one of the oldest private rum blends in the world. How to make a Ocho Old Fashioned 50 ml BACARDÍ Reserva Ocho rum 6.25 ml simple syrup 2 dashes Angostura® bitters Servings Copy Ocho Old Fashioned ingredients Copied! Ocho Old Fashioned Recipe One step at a time Step 1 Pour Add all ingredients into a rocks glass. Step 2 Chill Fill with ice. Step 3 Stir Stir until well mixed and very cold. Step 4 Garnish Garnish with an orange peel twist. MERCHANDISE GET KITTED OUT Glasses. Squeezers. Cocktail kits. Discover everything you need to create standout BACARDÍ cocktails. SHOP NOW OUR RECOMMENDED RUM COCKTAILS Like This? Try These If this is your kind of cocktail, here’s our selection of other BACARDÍ cocktails that might suit your taste VIEW ALL RUM COCKTAILS Ocho on the Rocks Diez Neat Rum Negroni Old Cuban Jungle Bird DRAG TO DISCOVER MORE VIEW ALL RUM COCKTAILS SOCIAL MOVE WITH US A soft sway, or a lively dance. We have something for everyone. Follow us on social to stay up-to-date with the latest BACARDÍ news. #DoWhatMovesYou FAQ WANT TO KNOW MORE? What is gold rum? Gold rum, also known as amber rum, usually provides rich and smooth flavors after being aged in barrels. What is aged rum? Rum can be aged anywhere from one year upwards. Aging rum can add additional complexity to its flavor and mouthfeel. What type of rum goes in an old fashioned? While the traditional old fashioned cocktail uses whiskey, we find that BACARDÍ Reserva Ocho rum works best to add exciting Caribbean tastes.
